summary: The session focused on fundamental techniques for beginner artists to improve their drawing skills, particularly emphasizing the importance of contour drawing and shading. The user expressed frustration with shading and sought advice on how to stay motivated while practicing.
facts: The user struggles with getting proportions right in their drawings. The user finds practicing shading to be boring and time-consuming. The user expressed a desire to skip shading and focus on other techniques. The user asked for tips on how to stay motivated when practicing shading. The user inquired about using their finger as a blending tool for shading. The user is interested in experimenting with different shading techniques to make practice more enjoyable. The user is open to receiving feedback from other artists to improve their shading skills.
